name: Project Manager Dev
updateContentCommand: echo '=== Installing dependencies ===' && cd backend && pip install -q -r requirements.simple.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && echo '=== Initializing database ===' && python3 init_db.py
postStartCommand: echo '=== Environment Ready ===' && echo 'Node version:' && node --version && echo 'Python version:' && python3 --version
